title: The Magic Toy Shop BiBi Doll Baby Doll Carry Cot up to 15" - Pink Polka Dot Bassinet with Pillow & Carry Handles, Portable Sleeping Carrier Bed for Girls & Boys Aged 18 Months+
features: INSPIRE HOURS OF IMAGINATIVE PLAY: Give your child the perfect baby doll bassinet accessory for their favourite toy. This beautiful baby doll cot provides a comfortable place for dolls up to 15 inches to sleep, encouraging nurturing pretend play and fun.

SOFT & COMFORTABLE DESIGN: Crafted from high-quality pink polka dot fabric with lace trim. This cushioned dolls cot includes a matching pillow, providing a cosy baby doll bed for naps or bedtime role-play.

PERFECTLY PORTABLE FOR PLAY: Features 2 strong, easy-grip handles, making this lightweight baby doll carrier simple for little hands. Ideal for moving room to room or on car journeys, it is a great addition to your baby doll accessories.

PERFECT GIFT IDEA: A charming dolls moses basket for birthdays or Christmas. This carrier encourages nurturing skills and is a must-have for any child's collection, including as a high-quality accessory for baby dolls.

SPECIFICATIONS: Item Dimensions: Width: 17 cm, Depth: 16 cm, Height: 35 cm / Weight: 120 g / Package Dimensions: Height: 35 cm, Width: 30 cm, Depth: 15 cm / Package Weight: 120 g / Material: Fabric / Color: Pink
